texto: Violators cannot live with the truth: survivors cannot live without it. There are those who still, once again, are poised to invalidate and deny us. If we don't assert our truth, it may again be relegated to fantasy. But the truth won't go away. It will keep surfacing until it is recognized. Truth will outlast any campaigns mounted against it, no matter how mighty, clever, or long. It is invincible. It's only a matter of which generation is willing to face it and, in so doing, protect future generations from ritual abuse.
explicacao: Citação de Chrystine Oksana sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Violators cannot live with the truth: survivors cannot live without it. There are those who still…” articula familia, abusers, child-abuse em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como child-abuse e child-protection.
